Wiki / Leveling & XP

Leveling & XP

You start at Level 0. Active play earns XP, and your level (derived from lifetime XP) gates major features and hands out cash rewards. Spending XP on research or training never lowers it.

Earning XP

XP per action

Auto-blends earn the least, so AFK play can't shortcut the curve.

ActionXP
Unlock a country+30
Unlock a flavor+18
Money milestone (per new order of magnitude held)+35
Earn an achievement+12
Buy an upgrade+10
Buy a shop+8
Hire an employee+5
Manual blend+3
Auto blend+1
Milestones

Level unlocks

LevelUnlocks
1Flavor unlocking
3Shop Extensions
5Employee hiring
6Research Lab
7Shake Price control
8Special Upgrades
10Wage management (also needs 10+ employees)
15Global Expansion (countries)

Backgrounds are available from the very start (Level 0).

The math

Formulas

XP to level up

The XP needed to go from level L to L+1 is floor(50 × (L+1)1.25) — each level costs progressively more.

Level-up reward

Reaching a level pays floor(150 × L1.5) in cash, scaling gently as you climb.

Max level

The cap is effectively unreachable at 2,147,483,647 — you'll never run out of levels.

Your level is computed from total lifetime XP. Your spendable XP balance funds research and staff training, but spending it leaves your level untouched.

ProgressionThe overview ResearchSpend your XP
